name: domain
description: Maintain UPPERCASE <DOMAIN>.md (living current-state snapshot, overwrite) + sister <DOMAIN>.log.md (append-only history, newest on top) at project root — single invocation writes BOTH. /domain <NAME> [update] · NL trigger ('ROADMAP 업데이트', 'STATUS.md 정리해줘'). Examples: ROADMAP.md+ROADMAP.log.md · STATUS.md+STATUS.log.md · PLAN.md+PLAN.log.md. Markdown analog of tape v1.2 <DOMAIN>.tape + <DOMAIN>.log.tape sister pattern.
